Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class AbstractExecutionElement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractExecutionNode, AbstractExecutionValue, AbstractExecutionVariable, ExecutionConstraint, ExecutionMethodReturnValue
public abstract class AbstractExecutionElement extends Object implements IExecutionElement
Provides a basic implementation of IExecutionElement.

      ture name is computed, false name is not computed yet.

    • lazyComputeName

      protected abstract String lazyComputeName() throws ProofInputException
      Computes the name of this node lazily when getName() is called the first time.
      Returns:
      The human readable name of this IExecutionNode.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

      Converts the given Term into a String respecting #isUsePretty().
